title: rubus tomentosus
intro: Rubus tomentosus, also known as the velvety raspberry or hairy raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to eastern Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus tomentosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus tomentosus can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
